data.main.py:
"""
FlowMaster Scheduling Service - Main Application
"""
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request
from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware
from fastapi.responses import JSONResponse
from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from datetime import datetime
from loguru import logger
import sys

from .config import settings
from .db.arango_client import db_client, init_db, close_db
from .core.scheduler import scheduler_engine
from .api.schedules import router as schedules_router
from .api.events import router as events_router
from .models.schemas import HealthResponse, SchedulerStatusResponse
from .infra.event_bus_client import event_bus_client
from .infra.ws_redis_client import ws_redis_client

# Configure logging
logger.remove()
logger.add(
    sys.stdout,
    format="<green>{time:YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss}</green> | <level>{level: <8}</level> | <cyan>{name}</cyan>:<cyan>{function}</cyan>:<cyan>{line}</cyan> - <level>{message}</level>",
    level=settings.LOG_LEVEL
)


@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    """Application lifespan manager"""
    logger.info(f"Starting {settings.SERVICE_NAME} v{settings.SERVICE_VERSION}")

    # Initialize database
    await init_db()
    logger.info("Database initialized")

    # Initialize scheduler
    await scheduler_engine.initialize()
    logger.info("Scheduler initialized")

    # Initialize WebSocket Redis for real-time updates
    if settings.WS_REDIS_ENABLED:
        await ws_redis_client.connect()
        logger.info("WebSocket Redis initialized")

    # Initialize Event Bus client and subscribe to execution events
    if getattr(settings, 'EVENT_BUS_ENABLED', True):
        await event_bus_client.initialize()

        # Subscribe to execution events to track process completion
        # Also subscribe to process.deleted for cascade delete of schedules
        webhook_url = f"http://{settings.SERVICE_NAME}:{settings.PORT}/api/v1/events/webhook"
        await event_bus_client.subscribe_to_events(
            topics=["execution.completed", "execution.failed", "process.deleted"],
            webhook_url=webhook_url
        )
        logger.info("Subscribed to execution and process events from Event Bus")

    yield

    # Shutdown
    logger.info("Shutting down...")
    await scheduler_engine.shutdown()
    if getattr(settings, 'EVENT_BUS_ENABLED', True):
        await event_bus_client.close()
    if settings.WS_REDIS_ENABLED:
        await ws_redis_client.disconnect()
    await close_db()
    logger.info("Shutdown complete")


# Create FastAPI app
app = FastAPI(
    title="FlowMaster Scheduling Service",
    description="Cron triggers, time-based process automation, timezone-aware schedules",
    version=settings.SERVICE_VERSION,
    lifespan=lifespan
)

# CORS middleware
app.add_middleware(
    CORSMiddleware,
    allow_origins=["*"],
    allow_credentials=True,
    allow_methods=["*"],
    allow_headers=["*"],
)


# Exception handler
@app.exception_handler(Exception)
async def global_exception_handler(request: Request, exc: Exception):
    logger.error(f"Unhandled exception: {exc}")
    return JSONResponse(
        status_code=500,
        content={"detail": "Internal server error", "error": str(exc)}
    )


# Include routers
app.include_router(schedules_router)
app.include_router(events_router)


# Health endpoints
@app.get("/health", response_model=HealthResponse, tags=["Health"])
async def health_check():
    """Health check endpoint"""
    # Check database connection
    db_connected = await db_client.check_connection()

    # Check scheduler
    scheduler_running = scheduler_engine.scheduler.running if scheduler_engine.scheduler else False

    return HealthResponse(
        status="healthy" if (db_connected and scheduler_running) else "degraded",
        service=settings.SERVICE_NAME,
        version=settings.SERVICE_VERSION,
        scheduler_running=scheduler_running,
        database_connected=db_connected,
        timestamp=datetime.now()
    )


@app.get("/health/ready", tags=["Health"])
async def readiness_check():
    """Readiness probe for Kubernetes"""
    try:
        db_connected = await db_client.check_connection()
        if not db_connected:
            return JSONResponse(status_code=503, content={"status": "not ready", "error": "Database not connected"})
    except Exception as e:
        return JSONResponse(status_code=503, content={"status": "not ready", "error": str(e)})

    if not scheduler_engine.scheduler or not scheduler_engine.scheduler.running:
        return JSONResponse(status_code=503, content={"status": "scheduler not running"})

    return {"status": "ready"}


@app.get("/health/live", tags=["Health"])
async def liveness_check():
    """Liveness probe for Kubernetes"""
    return {"status": "alive"}


@app.get("/scheduler/status", response_model=SchedulerStatusResponse, tags=["Scheduler"])
async def get_scheduler_status():
    """Get current scheduler status"""
    return scheduler_engine.get_scheduler_stats()


@app.get("/", tags=["Root"])
async def root():
    """Root endpoint"""
    return {
        "service": settings.SERVICE_NAME,
        "version": settings.SERVICE_VERSION,
        "docs": "/docs",
        "health": "/health"
    }


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import uvicorn
    uvicorn.run(
        "src.main:app",
        host=settings.HOST,
        port=settings.PORT,
        reload=settings.DEBUG
    )
